props.covers: The grid statement: RxC identical cells filled by item lines in row-major order, gap= from the spacing ladder (0/32/64/96); cells keep row and column identity, anchoring later placement.

text.insert: — the one shared gap between cells, from the spacing ladder: 0 (cells touching — tables), 32 (tight), 64 (standard), 96 (loose). Children are item lines in row-major order; the count must fit the lattice (more than (R−1)×C, at most R×C). Cells keep their row and column identity, and that skeleton anchors everything placed later (rule R4).

section 1 text=table label="grid 2x3 gap=32"
